summary.what: Fix query --range returning empty results after squash merge
summary.why: Entry anchor_commits reference feature branch SHAs that disappear from main after squash-merge, so commit-ancestry matching finds nothing even though entry files are in the diff
summary.how: Added DiffNameOnly to GitOps interface, fallback in getEntriesByRange discovers entries via git diff --name-only A..B -- .timbers/ when anchor matching returns zero
